base.$value: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'Noto Sans', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
base.$description: DM Sans — a modern humanist sans-serif with good email client support. System stack is the fallback.

mono.$value: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, 'SF Mono', Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace
mono.$description: Monospace font stack for debug email pre/code blocks.
